sections.title: Introduction / Motivation
sections.purpose: Define context and the memory bottleneck of LLMs.

sections.title: Research Question and Hypothesis
sections.purpose: Specify the hypotheses tested in CC-DFlash.

sections.title: Method Overview: CC-DFlash
sections.purpose: Explain the integration of prompt compression and memory offloading.

sections.title: Evaluation Setup
sections.purpose: Detail the datasets and evaluation bounds.
sections.evidence_to_use: GSM8K short-context numeric-quality evaluation, QMSum-style meeting QA long-context diagnostic evaluation

sections.title: Results Summary
sections.purpose: Report outcomes for GSM8K and QMSum.
sections.evidence_to_use: Task80A GSM8K: Baseline-AR 25/30, DFlash-R1 24/30, LLMLingua-AR-R2 24/30, CC-DFlash-R2 24/30. Task71/79B QMSum diagnostic evidence. Task80A QMSum incomplete rerun. Task80B issue-gate decision.
required_caveats: Task80A QMSum rerun is incomplete and should be treated as caveat
CC-DFlash-R2 faster than LLMLingua-AR-R2 on Task80A GSM8K is local noise timing

sections.title: Discussion
sections.purpose: Interpret findings based on the evidence matrices.

sections.title: Limitations
sections.purpose: Outline what wasn't tested and why.
required_caveats: DFlash-R1 remains a timing/runtime watch, not a confirmed regression

sections.title: Claim-Safety Boundary
sections.purpose: Explicitly state what this project does NOT claim.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.purpose: Wrap up based strictly on the allowed claims.

sections.title: Appendix / Artifact Index
sections.purpose: List raw artifacts and logs for reproducibility.

manual_writing_notes: Use this JSON and the CSV claim map as structural guidelines for the final prose. Do not inject unsupported speculation.
claim_safety_notes: Always append caveats when describing speedup or QMSum performance.
forbidden_claims: no claim that compression is proven useful end-to-end
no claim that DFlash-R1 is broken
